commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a captioned-final-text channel capability, enables it for Telegram, and changes ACP plus non-ACP final-mode TTS delivery to defer or suppress duplicate visible text while adding docs and regression tests.

PR surface: Source +421, Tests +1544, Docs +81. Total +2046 across 14 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main settles ACP visible text before the final TTS attempt, and the before-fix Telegram screenshot shows separate text and voice messages. I did not run a fresh live repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because the remaining blocker is contributor-supplied tagged Telegram proof plus maintainer acceptance of a public channel capability, not a safe automated source repair.
